parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
  story,
  story_summary,
  story_status,
  story_url,
  initiative,
  initiative_summary,
  all_labels,
  team,
  PM
FROM `guesty-data.jira.jira_hierarchy`
WHERE LOWER(all_labels) LIKE '%accounting%'
  AND story_status NOT IN ('Done', 'Closed', 'Cancelled')
  AND story IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY story
LIMIT 100

={{ 'SELECT t.ticket_id, t.subject, t.ticket_status, t.account_name, t.jira_ids, t.assignee_name, t.priority, t.created_at FROM `guesty-data.zendesk_analytics.tickets_clean` t WHERE t.ticket_status IN (\'open\', \'pending\') AND t.jira_ids IS NOT NULL AND (' + $json.filterClause + ') ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 200' }}
